ordered.title: Board UX: add lane-count badge contrast boost for quick scan
ordered.description: Improve Trello-like readability by increasing count-pill contrast in lane headers while preserving current spacing.

ordered.title: Board UX: add compact sticky-toolbar divider line between filters and lanes
ordered.description: Strengthen hierarchy by adding a subtle divider under sticky filter toolbar so lane content starts with clearer separation.

ordered.title: Board UX: tighten due-window chip spacing and wrap behavior on mobile
ordered.description: Follow-up polish for due-window legend chips to keep toolbar compact and readable under narrow widths.
